title: Sluissese
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Sluissi-TUR.png|thumb|right|250px|Sluissi, the native speakers of Sluissese]]
'''Sluissese''' was the native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Sluissi]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]]. Most Sluissi were fluent in both Sluissese and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], being literate in both languages. However, when speaking Basic, Sluissi tended to lisp and slur many words because of their snakelike mouths and viperine tongue.<ref name="u">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>

{{Language-stub}}

==Notable non-native speakers of Sluissese==
